properties.name: eventus.ui.enabled
properties.description: Enable the Eventus embedded UI at /eventus/. Default: true.

properties.name: eventus.chat.enabled
properties.description: Enable the AI query panel. Requires eventus.chat.anthropic-api-key. Default: false.

properties.name: eventus.chat.anthropic-api-key
properties.description: Anthropic API key for the AI query panel. Use ${ANTHROPIC_API_KEY}.

properties.name: eventus.chat.model
properties.description: Claude model to use for AI queries.

properties.name: eventus.chat.max-tokens
properties.description: Maximum tokens for AI query responses.
